70.8" Shoe Cabinet, 9-Tier Vertical Shoe Rack with Shutter Doors

description.plain: A 9-tier vertical shoe cabinet with hollow shutter doors for ventilated, dust-free, and organized shoe storage.

unique_selling_points: Hollow breathable shutter doors provide ventilation while concealing shoes for a tidy, odor-free space.
metadata.top_features:
Hollow breathable shutter doors: Allow air circulation to prevent odor and moisture buildup
Nine adjustable shelves: Accommodate up to 27 pairs of shoes for customizable storage
Ventilated design: Keeps shoes hidden and protected from dust
Sturdy engineered wood construction: Ensures durability and long-lasting use
Space-saving vertical structure: Minimizes floor space and fits easily in entryways or closets
metadata.tech_specs:
Dimensions: 28.74 in D x 13.78 in W x 70.86 in H
Number of tiers: 9
Maximum capacity: 27 pairs of shoes
Material: Engineered wood
Item weight: 116.15 lbs
Mounting type: Freestanding

media.alt_text: 70.8" Shoe Cabinet, 9 - Tier Vertical Shoe Rack with Shutter Doors Tribesigns

variants.title: 70.8" Shoe Cabinet, 9-Tier Vertical Shoe Rack with Shutter Doors

description.plain: Ventilated Doors - This wood shoe cabinet features uniquely designed hollow shutter doors that not only add to its aesthetics but also allow ventilation. This prevents any unwanted buildup of odor or moisture. The doors also keep your shoes hidden, maintaining a tidy look and protecting your shoes from dust. Ample Room - This 70.8'' tall shoe cabinet from Tribesigns is perfect for shoe enthusiasts. It houses nine tiers, offering ample space to store up to 27 pairs of shoes, which keeps your space tidy and makes your shoes easily locatable. Customizable Storage - This shoe cabinet also features adjustable shelves, each capable of holding up to 15 pounds. This lets you tailor the storage as per your requirement, making space for different sizes and styles of shoes. Space-Efficient - The vertical structure of this 9-tier shoe cabinet, with dimensions of 28.74" D x 13.77" W x 70.86" H, is an ideal space-saving solution. It uses minimal floor space and fits easily in your entryway, hallway, closet, or living room. Sturdy and Stylish - Like all other Tribesigns products, this tall shoe cabinet assures durability. Constructed from high-quality manufactured wood, it stands up to day-to-day use while maintaining its stylish look. Product Dimensions & Weights Details Length 28.74" Depth 13.78" Height 70.86" Item Weight 113.54 lbs Packaging Dimensions & Weights Box1: 33.46" L x 13.78" W x 5.31" H (28.0 lbs) Box2: 43.31" L x 15.75" W x 11.22" H (91.49 lbs) Note: This item will be delivered in two separate shipments. Installation Guide.pdf Tribesigns 70.8' Tall 9-Tier 27 Pairs Shoe Cabinet with Shutter Doors! The Tribesigns 70.8' Tall Shoe Cabinet is a beautiful and practical addition to any home, blending functionality with style effortlessly. Perfectly designed for use in entryways, hallways, closets, this cabinet introduces elegance with its rustic brown finish, complementing any decor seamlessly. Hollow Breathable Shutter Doors Offer Farmhouse Style! A standout feature of this cabinet is its hollow breathable shutter doors which allow air to circulate, mitigating bad odors and excessive moisture. Moreover, these shutter doors maintain a sleek look by hiding your shoes, keeping an air of tidiness. products.title: Shoe Cabinet, Shoe Rack with 3 Doors & Adjustable Shelves, Freestanding Entryway Shoe Organizer Cabinet

description.plain: A freestanding shoe cabinet with three doors, adjustable shelves, and ample storage for entryways and living spaces.

unique_selling_points: Features adjustable shelves and a soft-close mechanism for versatile, quiet storage of up to 30 pairs of shoes.
metadata.top_features:
Three doors with soft-close hinges ensure quiet and smooth access to stored shoes
Six adjustable shelves accommodate various shoe heights and styles for flexible organization
Two additional adjustable shelves on the right side provide extra space for boots and high heels
Top surface offers convenient storage for keys, wallets, or small items
Anti-tip kit included for enhanced stability on uneven floors
metadata.tech_specs:
Dimensions: 13.8 in D x 43.8 in W x 39.6 in H
Weight: 86.3 lb
Material: Engineered wood
Handle Material: Metal
Number of Doors: 3
Number of Shelves: 6
Installation Type: Freestanding

media.alt_text: IMAGE

variants.title: Shoe Cabinet, Shoe Rack with 3 Doors & Adjustable Shelves, Freestanding Entryway Shoe Organizer Cabinet

description.plain: Highlights This 3-door shoe cabinet provides practical storage for entryways and living areas. It can hold around 30 pairs of shoes, depending on shoe size and style. In the main compartments, one shelf is fixed, while the remaining shelves can be adjusted to fit different shoe heights. The right-side section features two adjustable shelves, making it suitable for taller footwear such as boots and high heels. The shoe rack also includes a top surface for placing everyday essentials like keys, wallets, or small decorative items. The doors are fitted with soft-close hinges for smoother and quieter operation. Constructed from engineered wood, the storage cabinet is supported by metal legs with adjustable feet to help keep it level on uneven floors. An anti-tip kit is included for added stability. Item Dimensions 13.8"D x 43.8"W x 39.6"H Item Weight 86.3 Pounds Material Type Engineered Wood Handle Material Metal Style Name Modern Door Style Flat Panel Number of Doors 3 Number Of Shelves 6 Installation Type Freestanding Additional Features Adjustable Shelf, Cross Molding Doors, Adjustable Footpads Room Type Entryway, Hallway, Living Room Required Assembly Yes

media.alt_text: 20 - Pair Shoe Cabinet, Stylish Shoe Rack Organizer With Doors Tribesigns

variants.title: 20-Pair Shoe Cabinet, Stylish Shoe Rack Organizer With Doors

description.plain: Louvered Door Design - Looking to preserve your shoes longer? Our Ventilated Louvered Door Shoe Cabinet could be your answer. With louvered doors that encourage optimal airflow and a rich brown finish, it offers the perfect blend of style and shoe care. Generous Storage Capacity - This shoe cabinet offers five roomy shelves and can easily accommodate up to 20 pairs of shoes. The tabletop is ideal for storing daily essentials, keys, and bags, while the open bottom shelf is perfect for your slippers. Adjustable Storage - With four adjustable shelves, our versatile shoe cabinet caters to all your footwear storage needs. Simply position each shelf to match the height of your shoes, from flats to boots. Robust and Reliable - Crafted from top-quality engineered wood, our entryway shoe cabinet is durable and built to last. Stable, 1.7-inch-wide legs, coupled with sturdy hinges, support heavy loads and ensure smooth door operation. Safety Assured Construction - Keeping safety in mind, our cabinet is designed with a built-in rear anti-tip device to prevent unintentional overturns, offering an added layer of protection for your family. Hassle-Free Assembly - No more stressful furniture assembly! Our freestanding shoe cabinet includes all necessary components along with easy-to-follow instructions for a stress-free setup. If needed, the shelves can also be removed to accommodate larger items. This shoe cabinet has louvered doors that protect your footwear by providing better ventilation and privacy. Durably crafted from premium engineered wood, and supported by robust 1.7-inch-wide legs, our shoe storage cabinet is built to last. With a built-in anti-tip mechanism and floor-protecting adjustable foot pads, you can enjoy added safety. variants.title: 30 Pairs Shoe Cabinet, 6-Tier Modern Shoes Rack Organizer with Doors

description.plain: Elegant & Multipurpose - This 30 pair shoe rack with slim metal handles, adds a chic look to your space. It's perfect as a shoe rack in the entrance or as a storage cabinet in any room. Ample Storage - At 13.77"D x 35.43"W x 43.3"H, this 6 tier shoe rack holds up to 25-30 pairs of shoes. Its large countertop and extra bottom space can conveniently store essentials like keys and hats, or slippers and cleaning tools. Customizable - With 5 adjustable shelves, you can arrange your various shoes easily. Two rear vent holes help with air circulation and odor dissipation. Sturdy & Safe - Made of high-quality particleboard with metal legs, this cabinet is built to last. It includes toppling-preventing devices and adjustable feet for floor protection. Easy Assembly & Warranty - This shoes cabinet with doors comes with clear instructions and assembly tools for a quick setup. We offer an 18-month warranty and excellent customer service. SPACIOUS TABLETOP, TIDY You can also store and display your keys, photo albums, and plants on the wide countertop with protective panels. RICH TEXTURE, ELEGANT LOOK The streamlined carved door completes the minimalist charm of your space. Panels are waterproof and easy to clean. TWO AIR HOLES It is airy with the air holes on the entryway shoe cabinet back. ANTI-TIP KIT Toppling-preventing devices are included for added security. QUALITY HINGES Keep the shoe storage cabinet securely open and closed, and protect your fingers get hurt. PROTECTION PAD Prevents floor scratches and balances to accommodate uneven floors. media.alt_text: 66.9" Tall Shoe Storage Cabinet, 8-Tier Entryway Shoe Organizer Rack with Acrylic Doors and LED Lights

variants.title: 66.9" Tall Shoe Storage Cabinet, 8-Tier Entryway Shoe Organizer Rack with Acrylic Doors and LED Lights

description.plain: Sleek Design & Contemporary Style - Defined by clean lines and elegant doors adorned with hazy acrylic, this cabinet aligns seamlessly with your personal taste and interior decor. The design perfectly complements any home decor. Cabinet with Acrylic Doors - The freestanding shoe cabinet features tempered acrylic, ensuring it won't easily break during transportation. Soft lighting behind the acrylic doors creates a welcoming atmosphere and enhances your space while saving you from fumbling in the dark. Vibrant LED Lights - This white shoe rack boasts striking LED lights, adding allure to any room. Sync the lights to your preferred colors using a remote for a customizable smart home experience. Enjoy the convenience of adjusting your lights from any location, effortlessly. Versatile & Generous Storage - The tall shoe rack sports a compartment design capable of holding 16-24 pairs of shoes, depending on their size and height. The 8-tier shoe cabinet offers adjustable shelves to house a variety of footwear, from flats and boots to high heels. Two hooks on each side are handy for hanging small items like keys, hats, or clutches, making the most of the space! Solid & Stable - The shoe storage for closets is constructed from 0.6" thick manufactured wood and structured for stability to prevent wobbling or collapsing. It can support a maximum load of 330 lb. Effortless Assembly - Easily cleaned with a damp cloth, the entryway shoe organizer cabinet is simple to assemble. However, a two-person assembly would make the process more efficient and less cumbersome. Soft lighting behind the acrylic doors creates a welcoming atmosphere and enhances your space while saving you from fumbling in the dark. Vibrant LED Lights - This white shoe rack boasts striking LED lights, adding allure to any room. Sync the lights to your preferred colors using a remote for a customizable smart home experience. Enjoy the convenience of adjusting your lights from any location, effortlessly. Versatile & Generous Storage - The tall shoe rack sports a compartment design capable of holding 16-24 pairs of shoes, depending on their size and height. The 8-tier shoe cabinet offers adjustable shelves to house a variety of footwear, from flats and boots to high heels. Two hooks on each side are handy for hanging small items like keys, hats, or clutches, making the most of the space! Solid & Stable - The shoe storage for closets is constructed from 0.6" thick manufactured wood and structured for stability to prevent wobbling or collapsing. It can support a maximum load of 330 lb. Effortless Assembly - Easily cleaned with a damp cloth, the entryway shoe organizer cabinet is simple to assemble. However, a two-person assembly would make the process more efficient and less cumbersome. Exquisite Gold Handle Goes with any décor and draw admiring glances from visitors to your home Premium Side Hooks Double sides with 3 hooks can hang your keys, hats, small clutch bag etc. Adjustable Shelves Adjustable panel helps you easily classify your different types of shoes from slippers to boots. High Quality Hardware High quality hardware can make shoe storage strong and use long term. Height-adjustable removable middle shelf maximizes storage and accessibility
Classic rattan finish and solid wood legs provide a minimalist, stylish look

description.plain: SPECIFICATIONS General Use: Home Furniture Specific Use: Shoe Rack 5/7 Tiers Shoe Storage Cabinet Rack with Doors Free Standing Shoe Rack Wooden Shoe Storage Shelves for Entryway Hallway Closet Features: 1.Exquisite Storage: The top platform accommodates decorative photo frames and keys, while the removable middle shelf is height adjustable. This design maximizes every inch of the wooden shoe cabinet, making your favorite shoes easily accessible and keeping the entryway tidy and organized. 2.Minimalist Versatile Design: Featuring a classic rattan finish complemented by solid wood legs and aluminum alloy handles, this shoe rack organizer is both simple and stylish. It perfectly blends with various home decor styles, creating a harmonious and visually appealing ensemble. 3.High Quality and Durability: Made with premium materials, the side panels and tabletop have been thickened to 15mm, significantly enhancing the stability and durability of this shoe storage cabinet rack, allowing it to comfortably support the weight of multiple pairs of shoes. 4.Easy Assembly: Designed with simplicity in mind, this free standing shoe rack comes with detailed pictorial instructions for hassle-free assembly. The anti-tip device ensures more stable and safer usage, offering you a reliable storage solution. 5.Multi-Scenario Adaptability: Perfectly blending classic rectangular rattan doors, this wooden shoe storage shelves seamlessly integrate into every corner, whether placed in the entrance as a shoe storage cabinet, transformed into a functional coffee table in the dining room or used as an elegant bookshelf in the study. description.plain: About this item Spacious Shoe Storage : Organize and store your varied shoe collection with this spacious 5-tier shoe cabinet with doors that holds 20 pairs of shoes. The tribesigns shoe cabinet also features a large drawer that is perfect for storing socks, sunglasses and other everyday essentials. Plus, the spacious top of walnut shoe cabinet can display photo frames, plants, and other accessories Flexible Ways to Organize Shoes : This 5-tier shoe rack cabinet comes with adjustable shelves so you can easily sort all types of shoes, from slippers to boots. Measuring: 15.75'D x 31.5'W x 39.37'H, this shoe rack can hold up to 20 pairs of shoes. This shoe organizer for entryway can help you and your family organize unwanted shoes and keep your home tidy Built to Last : This wooden shoe cabinet, crafted from premium boards and sturdy metal base, provides reliable support. This entryway shoe storage cabinet features gold handles, smooth sliding drawers and a door with metal hinges for easy operation. Its enclosed design shields shoes from dust while the rear vents maintain good ventilation Versatile Design : Not only does this shoe cabinet with drawer offer ample storage, but it also serves as a stylish addition to any room. The sleek design of shoe organizer cabinet features exquisite detailing and a rich finish complemented by eye-catching gold accents. Whether you want to organize your shoe collection or add a stylish and practical piece to your home, this shoe cabinet storage for entryway is the perfect choice
